chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4589 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judges Hearing of case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 M/s. Mohsin Habib & Ehtesham, Advocates for Petitioners. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, APG. PI Hakim Ali, PI/I.O. Nabi Bux, PS Shahlateef Town, Karachi. ---------------------------- I.O. Nabi Bux of PS Shah Lateef Town, Karachi has recorded the statement of the Petitioner No.1 Mst. Anshara Shamim under Section 161 Cr.P.C and on the basis of statement 161 Cr.PC I.O. states that he will file his report in ‘C’ class before concerned magistrate. He shall do so within 03 days of the date of this order. SHO, PS Shah Lateef Town is directed to provide protection to the petitioners. Instant petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES. JUDGE
